description:
The quiz assesses PostgreSQL proficiency by testing knowledge of built‑in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and various lesser‑known database quirks, presented in an engaging, instructional tone that balances challenge with learning. It is positioned as intermediate to advanced difficulty, encouraging participants to deepen their practical skills while enjoying a gamified experience.
Topics: PostgreSQL built‑in aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, Database gotchas and edge cases, Advanced SQL features
Audience: Developers, database administrators, and data engineers who already have basic SQL experience and want to sharpen their PostgreSQL expertise.
